source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
In the figure there are nine regions inside the five circles. All of the numbers from 1 to 9 are written in the regions, one to each region, so that the sum of the numbers inside each circle is 11 .
Which number must be written in the region with the question mark?
<image1>
